title: Cuando quiere un mexicano
writer: Juan Bustillo Oro, Humberto Gómez Landero, Enrique Uthoff
actors: Jorge Negrete, Amanda Ledesma, Enrique Herrera
plot: Mercedes, daughter of a banker, rejects all suitors, so his father decides she must marry to inherit his fortune. A forced landing brings her and her faithful maid to Guillermo's hacienda. He hates women, and she despises men.
